title: Kantha Stitch Cushion Cover (Set of 2)
shortDescription: Two cotton cushion covers with traditional running-stitch embroidery.
description: A pair of 16x16 inch cushion covers in pure cotton, finished with hand-done kantha running-stitch embroidery — a needlework tradition from rural Bengal. Concealed zip closure; machine wash cold, gentle cycle.
